blended.narrative: Brundage Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,974 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 3" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
